license: PD-US-GOV (Farm Security Administration / Office of War Information)
rights_holder: Photograph by Dorothea Lange, taken on assignment for the Farm Security Administration (a U.S. federal agency) — work of a U.S. federal employee, public domain
attribution: Dorothea Lange, "Migrant Mother" (Florence Owens Thompson with several of her children), Nipomo, California, March 1936. Library of Congress, Prints and Photographs Division. PD-US-GOV (FSA/OWI).
subject: Dorothea Lange's most-reproduced FSA photograph. Lange contributed five plates to The Family of Man (#48, #93, #99, #133, #183 in the 1955 Master Checklist; our photo-0045, photo-0087, photo-0093, photo-0127, photo-0175). Plate-level identification of "Migrant Mother" with any specific Family of Man plate has not been verified against a Tier-1 source as of 2026-04-25; this image is offered as an example of Lange's FSA work, not a direct visual of any specific FoM plate.
